brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: First things first. Show me the time range we're working with. MIN and MAX of timestamp.

template.text: MIN(timestamp) AS start, MAX(timestamp) AS end

expected.sql: SELECT MIN(timestamp) AS start, MAX(timestamp) AS end FROM logs

hints.text: Carol: 'That returned more than one row. MIN and MAX together produce one summary row.'
Carol: 'Empty result. The table is logs.'
Carol: 'Query error. The table is logs. Nothing else.'
Carol: 'FROM logs. The table is called logs. One row back.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Eight to eleven. Three hours. Whoever was moving, they were moving in that window.
